# deterministic-design

> deterministic-design is a Claude Code skill that renders your UI and proves it's balanced and usable: a deterministic layout audit plus a vision-judged usability score.

## Install (Claude Code)
- Add the marketplace: `/plugin marketplace add connerkward/ckw-skills`
- Install this plugin: `/plugin install deterministic-design@connerkward`

## Links
- Canonical README: https://github.com/connerkward/deterministic-design-skill
- Marketplace (all of Conner K. Ward's skills + MCP servers): https://github.com/connerkward/ckw-skills

## Optional
- Author: Conner K. Ward — https://github.com/connerkward
